pain_point: Manual extraction and verification of data across complex non-profit and affordable housing compliance documents.
draft_email: I noticed on your website that Watson & McDonell specializes in serving non-profit organizations and managing affordable housing compliance in the Pacific Northwest. Given the complexity of affordable housing tax credits and grant reporting, your team likely spends countless billable hours manually extracting and verifying data across hundreds of pages of unstructured client documents. Our Universal Document Analysis platform can automatically parse and categorize the necessary data from these heavy compliance applications, completely streamlining your review workflows.
